result:
## Round 23 Goal

**Add spaceship/glider detection to the pattern census.**

The census overlay (round 19) currently recognizes 14 static templates — 8 still lifes and 6 oscillator phases. But it's blind to *moving* structures, which are the most visually dramatic objects in the simulation, especially on exotic topologies where gliders wrap through Klein bottles and Möbius strips.

**Plan:** Detect gliders and lightweight/medium/heavyweight spaceships by comparing consecutive frames — match a known template at position (x,y) in frame N, then confirm it shifted by the expected displacement in frame N+1. Color-code detected spaceships in cyan (distinct from green still lifes and amber oscillators), show their travel direction with a Unicode arrow overlay (↑↓←→↗↘↙↖), and add spaceship counts to the census legend panel. This directly compounds the value of topological surfaces (round 22) since gliders on a Klein bottle reverse direction mid-flight — the tracker will make that visible.

Shall I build it?
